_comment: Act 0 / Challenge 0.1 — The Ketchup Gauntlet (combat, 1 wave, tutorial). Consumed by beacon firmware and sim. File loaded at /spiffs/challenge_0_1.json.
name: The Ketchup Gauntlet

combat._comment_rng: Combat is server-authoritative: the server generates and records every roll. A badge may attach optional client entropy from onion.secure_random; it never gates the outcome. There is no badge signing (onion.se_sign does not exist).

screen._comment_hostile_trigger: Pressing RIGHT at the vendor menu = 'order ketchup' -> triggers the ketchup-hostile narrative path.
screen._comment_normal: Any of these at the vendor menu bypasses ketchup narrative but still enters combat (tutorial: both paths lead to combat).

_comment_subghz: No sub-GHz for this challenge. Sub-GHz jamming/handshake mechanics are used in 2.1 and 3.4.
_comment_voice: No voice capture for this challenge. Voice challenges begin at 1.1.
_comment_merchant: No merchant buttons for this challenge. Merchant UI is introduced in 2.2.

rewards._comment: Operative registration is also triggered server-side on first win (engine/validate side effect).

sim._comment: Simulator (sim/) uses these values to emulate the beacon hardware.
sim.landmark: Busted hot dog stand — Vienna Bob's
sim._comment_location: Near the Fulton Market district — historically Chicago's meatpacking hub, referenced in the challenge footnote.
